title: Master v0.4.3 Access Control Cleanup
notes:
Adds cleanup controls so Master can delete access accounts and revoke/delete temporary access keys.

Changes:
- Adds Selected Access Cleanup panel.
- Click an account card to select it.
- Delete selected account.
- Click a temp key card to select it.
- Revoke selected temp key.
- Delete selected temp key.
- Writes history entries for cleanup actions.
- Sends Discord webhook alerts if enabled.
- Keeps Discord webhook button fix from v0.4.2.
